Assess Your English
With AI Precision

Get your CEFR-scored English proficiency results in minutes. Our AI evaluates 6 core skills — reading, writing, listening, speaking, grammar, and vocabulary — with detailed feedback and actionable insights.

Comprehensive Coverage

6 Dimensions of English Proficiency

Our AI evaluates every aspect of your English proficiency with granular precision.

Reading

A1–C2
  • Main ideas and detailed comprehension
  • Understanding implicit meaning
  • Analyzing text structure
  • Vocabulary inference
  • Reading speed and accuracy

Writing

A1–C2
  • Cohesion and coherence
  • Grammatical accuracy
  • Lexical resource
  • Task achievement
  • Writing mechanics

Listening

A1–C2
  • Main ideas and details
  • Understanding speakers' attitude
  • Following complex arguments
  • Multiple speaker comprehension
  • Accent familiarity

Speaking

A1–C2
  • Fluency and coherence
  • Lexical resource
  • Grammatical range
  • Pronunciation clarity
  • Interactive communication

Grammar

A1–C2
  • Sentence formation
  • Tense accuracy
  • Complex structures
  • Error patterns
  • Grammar application

Vocabulary

A1–C2
  • Word range
  • Precision
  • Collocations
  • Register awareness
  • Topic-specific vocabulary
CEFR Framework

Interactive CEFR Levels

Click on each level to see detailed progression from beginner to mastery.

A1

A1 — Beginner

17% Complete

Can understand and use familiar everyday expressions and very basic phrases. Can introduce themselves and others.

Key Capabilities

Basic greetings
Numbers & dates
Simple questions
Common words
Simple Process

How It Works

Get your CEFR score in just 4 simple steps.

1

Create Account

Sign up in seconds with just your email. No lengthy registration required.

2

Take Assessment

Complete the 6-skill test at your own pace. Each section takes about 10 minutes.

3

Get AI Results

Receive instant CEFR scores with detailed AI feedback on all 6 core skills.

4

Download Certificate

Get your official CEFR certificate and detailed improvement report instantly.

Pricing

Flexible Pricing

Start free and upgrade as you grow. All plans include our AI-powered scoring engine.

Free

Perfect for getting started

$0
  • 1 comprehensive assessment
  • Basic CEFR level result
  • Skill breakdown scores
  • Watermarked certificate

Single Test

Full assessment with detailed report

$12.99
  • Complete 6-skill assessment
  • Detailed CEFR score
  • AI-powered feedback
  • Downloadable PDF certificate
Most Popular

$49.99

  • Full analytics suite
